mainDressCode.title: Attire Guide
mainDressCode.description: Cream, beige, gray, black and navy (can add also touch of white).

sections.title: Principal Sponsors
sections.description: For Ninongs: Formal suit in black, gray, or navy. For Ninangs: Floor-length gown in cream, beige, gray, black, or navy (with a touch of white).

sections.title: Guests
sections.shortDescription: Ladies: Modest dress. Men: Long sleeves in cream, beige, gray, black, or navy (touch of white allowed).
